source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Delicate support UI with clear English case labels, stable tabular metrics, and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese queues, diagnostics, status, and knowledge-base workflows.
layout: Precise 8px support grids, glass-wing cards, fine vein separators, compact queue and SLA tables, restrained 8px components, translucent membrane texture, and gold-eye focus rings.

prompts.label: Transparent lacewing wings motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Lacewing transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a single green lacewing insect motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A delicate adult lacewing viewed from slightly above, long slender pale leaf-green body, four elongated translucent glass-like wings with fine lace vein network, softly iridescent wing membranes, bright gold eyes, fine antennae, accurate insect anatomy. The identity must read as lacewing, not dragonfly, damselfly, mosquito, moth, or generic fly.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full antennae, body, legs, and all wings without cropping. Elegant diagonal resting posture suitable for a motif asset. Clean studio lighting that preserves pale green body, glass wing texture, and gold eyes. No cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the insect on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject. Render wing membranes as pale glass with crisp visible edges and veins so chroma-key removal can preserve the silhouette.
Constraints: no leaf, no flower, no branch, no garden scene, no second insect, no text, no watermark, no specimen pins, no blur, no contact shadow.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Lacewing light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Lacewing", derived from the generated transparent lacewing motif: pale green body, glassy lace wings with fine vein mesh, bright gold eyes, garden leaf context, delicate support-system mood. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI system.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 target, clean professional UI design-system presentation. Use large legible labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Lacewing, Lacewing Wings, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Support Dashboard / Data, Forms, Table, Command / Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from pale leaf-green lacewing body, translucent glass wings, fine gold and gray wing veins, bright gold eyes, soft garden leaf highlights, and delicate insect structure. The board must read as lacewing wings, not dragonfly, butterfly, moth, or generic green UI.
Typography: English support-system UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 状態. Use bilingual support, case, knowledge-base, queue, and diagnostics labels with tabular numbers.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, support queue cards, SLA metric cards, knowledge base panel, table rows, case list, command search palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, date picker, filters, status chips, spacing scale, radius samples, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons, theme token swatches.
Style: delicate support system, precise 8px grid and 8px card radius, warm wing-white surfaces, pale green primary actions, garden-leaf navigation and success states, gold-eye focus rings and badges, smoky glass-wing borders, fine lace-vein dividers, subtle translucent membrane texture, dense but calm support dashboards, polished shadcn/tweakcn component language.
Color palette: keep colors faithful to lacewing: wing ivory, membrane mist, pale glass green, leaf vein green, gold eye, amber focus, gray vein, deep moss ink, soft garden shadow. Avoid unrelated saturated colors.
Constraints: no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon colors, no beige-only palette, no butterfly identity, no dragonfly identity, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Lacewing", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Lacewing dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Lacewing" / "Lacewing Wings". Translate the same light design-system language into dark mode; do not invent a new unrelated theme. Use the generated transparent lacewing motif and the generated light board as visual references in this conversation.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 target, clean professional shadcn/tweakcn design-system presentation, delicate support-system mood. Keep labels large and legible.
Required visible sections: Morphous Lacewing, Lacewing Wings, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Support Dashboard / Data, Forms, Table, Command / Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve pale leaf-green actions, translucent glass-wing surfaces, fine gray and gold wing-vein separators, bright gold-eye focus rings, moss navigation, support queue cards, case tables, command search, status chips, SLA metrics, and an 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. The board must read as lacewing wings, not dragonfly, butterfly, moth, or generic dark dashboard.
Typography: English support-system UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 状態. Use compact bilingual support, case, diagnostics, queue, and knowledge-base labels with tabular numbers.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/tertiary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, checkbox, radio, switch, input, select, textarea, tabs, badges, alerts, support cards, SLA metrics, queue summary, case table rows, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, sidebar navigation, command search palette, filters, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, date picker, texture samples, radius samples, spacing scale, shadow samples, token code snippets, icon set.
Visual details: deep moss-black background, smoky glass panels, pale green active states, gold-eye chart highlights, wing-ivory text, leaf-vein focus rings and success chips, fine lace-wing texture overlays, translucent membrane borders, thin vein-line separators, restrained contrast, crisp controls and dashboards.
Color palette: dark tokens derived from lacewing: moss ink, glass charcoal, night leaf, wing ivory, pale green glow, gold eye, amber focus, smoke gray vein, mist highlight. Avoid unrelated saturated colors.
Constraints: no neon green, no generic black-and-green hacker UI, no pure-black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple or blue gradient dominance, no butterfly identity, no dragonfly identity, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Lacewing", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
